longDescription: EcoFlow Delta 2 Max is our fastest charging with best app experience. EcoFlow Delta 2 Max charges 0-80% in 43 minutes with X-Stream technology. Smart app control and modular expansion set it apart. After extensive hands-on testing, we found it delivers on its promises with insane 43-minute 0-80% charge.
